- **Serif display** for declarative headlines + the certificate title only — `Editorial New` (or fully-free `Fraunces` at high contrast). Signals scholarly archive over generic grotesk.
- **Geist** (free, OFL) for all body/UI — engineered, not default-Inter.
- **IBM Plex Mono** (free) for EVERY piece of chain data: slots, pubkeys, roots, proof bytes, balances — always tabular figures. Mono = the verifiable-compute signal. `3270`/`Departure Mono` only for the live prover-log HUD.

## Landing (ordered)
Hero ("Read the past. Prove it on-chain.") → The Gap (Solana is blind to its history) → How It Works (scrollytelling proof pipeline, Merkle path climbing leaf→root) → Tamper Toggle → Proof Model (ZK/Optimistic/Hybrid token-cards + verifier snippet) → Use Cases (concrete "prove W held ≥N of MINT at slot S") → The Ledger/Network (live feed + real metrics + roles) → Roadmap (vertical strata timeline) → $YORE/Footer (utility table + honest genesis-trust note + guilloche band).

Two registers, split on purpose: **WebGL/strata spectacle for the hero; institutional Fossil-paper + serif for the proof/receipt UI** — because Yore makes real cryptographic claims and the verification surface must feel like a security document, not a hype page.

## The dapp shell
One terminal-archive shell, "one shell many query types via tabs." Left rail = query types (Balance-at-slot live; TWAP / Holding / Eligibility as "coming" so the taxonomy reads as real infra). Center = the **Query Console** (one dense action card, Jupiter-style); right = the **Proof Drawer**.

Four felt states, narrated by motion (the wait IS the explanation):
1. **Compose** — mono inputs for account W + target slot S (with epoch helper + "pick on the strata column"), settlement toggle (Optimistic / Instant-ZK) that maps to the reverse-Dutch price; live verifier-call snippet beside it.
2. **Aucting/Proving** — price ticks down-to-claim in Amber; prover log streams `reading state @ slot S · building Merkle path · generating Groth16…`; the Merkle branch climbs leaf→root in real time. Numbers tick in place, never reload.
3. **Verifying** — a single emphasized `alt_bn128 verify` line resolves; the seal starts drawing from the root bytes.
4. **Verified** — seal stamps, Oxide→Patina reconcile, and the view switches to a **Fossil-paper certificate**: the plain proven fact, then the inspectable receipt (committed root, expandable Merkle path, proof bytes, verifier tx → Solscan, prover, settle path), a client-side "Verify yourself" button, and a copy-as-CPI snippet. Tensor-style Lite/Pro density toggle.

## How to build it
Next.js (App Router) + Tailwind (palette tokens, `tabular-nums`) + framer-motion baseline. GSAP+ScrollTrigger+SplitText (now fully free) for scrollytelling and per-char headline stagger with asymmetric timing. Lenis bound into the GSAP ticker (shared rAF), gentle, fully behind `prefers-reduced-motion` — **no scroll-hijacking** on technical content. Strata hero in **OGL/Canvas** (not full three.js) since it's the only heavy visual — one reused stratum primitive, render only visible slices, fed real slot data. Proof Seal = pure SVG from a Lissajous/epicycloid generator seeded by root bytes, self-drawn via stroke-dashoffset, path cached. Tamper toggle + Merkle path use **@noble/hashes** to *actually* re-derive the branch on byte-flip — real, not faked, because this is a proof product. Solana: @solana/web3.js + wallet-adapter (provider-grid bottom-sheet) reading the real verifier/commitment-registry accounts.

Guardrails: bake noise to a texture, tier fidelity (WebGL desktop → static SVG column on mobile/reduced-motion), one accent for one action, real metrics only (unverifiable stats are self-undermining for a verifiability product). Every 3D/shader element maps to real on-chain/state data or it gets cut.

## Files referenced for grounding
- `/Users/nk/Desktop/Yore/id.md` — full technical concept (flow, roles, proof model, $YORE utility, MVP = balance-at-slot, roadmap).
- `/Users/nk/Desktop/Yore/programs/yore/src/lib.rs` — Anchor program (declare_id `3YnWj7ftTswFDKHSj9jxxzEJCQC2FB37zrDpzqfAB7px`; currently scaffold `initialize`).
- `/Users/nk/Desktop/Yore/Anchor.toml`, `/Users/nk/Desktop/Yore/tests/yore.ts` — Anchor/test setup. The dapp shell copy (instruction names, verifier call) should track these as the programs are built out.
